data.body: Reproduction artifacts committed to docs/experiments/code-grounding-spike/ (spike_yield.py — self-contained, builds the fixture in a tempdir; detectors_builtin/ + detectors_project/ — the OpenGrep/semgrep registry-substrate rules; README.md — full results). Re-verified: harness reproduces 10/10 yield, 0 false-refute from a clean checkout.
